caveats: No claim of best point-prediction accuracy; the published STimage context reports higher PCC than this local smoke.
claim_scope: Preliminary calibration-scoped evidence: local intervals cover the same held-out split near nominal while cheap same-split point baselines are lower than the local smoke.

required_for_validated: published SOTA run on the exact same held-out split
evidence that the calibration claim remains useful against reproduced SOTA predictions
public visible summary of all same-split and reference-reported rows
